name: Diplomacy
description: 4-player territory control where negotiation is the core mechanic. Whisper private deals, then simultaneously reveal orders. Watch who kept their promises and who betrayed their allies.
rules:
OVERVIEW
Four-player territory control on an 18-territory grid. Players negotiate, then secretly issue simultaneous army orders. First to 5 of 8 supply centers wins; after round 10, most supply centers wins, then army count breaks ties.

PHASES
Negotiate: no game actions; deals are non-binding.
Orders: each player orders one army at a time until all owned armies have orders. hold defends, move attacks an adjacent territory, support adds +1 to an adjacent hold or move and is cut if attacked.
Resolve: orders reveal, highest unique strength wins contested territories, ties bounce, dislodged armies auto-retreat or disband.
Reinforce: every 2 rounds, armies adjust to supply center count.

VIEW
agentView shows the map, armies, supply centers, counts, and your pending orders.
